title: Google Calendar Lead Integration
excerpt: I have a shared calendar where the lady in the office inputs my leads.  I’ve been trying to make it so when a lead is added, it pulls their name, appointment date, time, lead source, phone number, and email from the even…

posts.author: BTCjas (Jason)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a shared calendar where the lady in the office inputs my leads. I’ve been trying to make it so when a lead is added, it pulls their name, appointment date, time, lead source, phone number, and email from the event. Is this possible?

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @BTCjas, welcome to the community!

the out of the box google integration only syncs name, time, date from Monday.com to Google calendar. In order to get the additional detail information you would need some custom integration using zapier or integromat or something the like.

If you would like help setting up this integration or other assistance with monday.com I offer a free 30m consult to get you started. You can book one here if you are interested: Calendly - Tim Little

hope that helps.

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @BTCjas - Integromat can help solve this. We have Integromat and Zapier automation experts on our team. We offer a limited number of no-charge strategy sessions in the community each week. You can book one here if you like to chat about your lead management: Book a call with Polished Geek: Do more with monday․com
